_comment: Fixed version of EV Parking module import - Replace placeholder UUIDs with actual values from database
_instructions: Run 'node scripts/get_discipline_uuids_for_modules.js' to get valid discipline/subtype UUIDs
title: Electric Vehicle Parking Safety
description: This module covers physical security concerns related to electric vehicle (EV) parking areas.

module_questions._comment: Camera/video question - using VSS (Video Surveillance Systems) discipline with Exterior Cameras subtype
module_questions.text: Is video coverage implemented for EV charging stations and their immediate approaches to support incident detection and post-incident review?

module_questions._comment: Access control question - using ACS (Access Control Systems) discipline with Electronic Access Control subtype
module_questions.text: Is physical access to EV charging areas restricted to authorized personnel?

module_ofcs.ofc_text: Consider implementing video coverage for EV charging stations and their immediate approaches to support incident detection and post-incident review.

sources.label: Why EV Charger Security Matters (ChargeLab, October 2024)

module_ofcs.ofc_text: Consider implementing adequate lighting at EV parking areas to improve safety and visibility during hours of darkness.

risk_drivers._comment: Property crime risk - use FRAUD_DRIVER for theft-related risks
risk_drivers.driver_text: Electric vehicle charging stations may be attractive targets for theft due to valuable components, increasing criminal targeting of charging locations.
Unauthorized access to EV charging systems may enable physical tampering or unsafe conditions at charging stations.
